name: amplitude
description: Reads and manages Amplitude behavioral cohorts, chart annotations, annotation categories, event lists, and the governed taxonomy (event/category definitions) through the Amplitude Analytics REST API.

risk.read: external Amplitude API read of behavioral analytics data
risk.write: external Amplitude API mutation of chart annotations, annotation categories, and governed taxonomy event/category definitions — never behavioral event data itself
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
